Compassionate Care for Asheville Pets

Horizon Veterinarian provides personalized veterinary care in Asheville and surrounding areas. We understand your pet is family and treat them with the same love and attention.

What We Do

Our Services

SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Trusted Veterinary Care in Asheville

Founded in 2012, Horizon Veterinarian has been serving Asheville's pets with dedication and expertise. Our team of experienced veterinarians and staff are committed to providing the highest standard of care for your furry family members.

We believe in a personalized approach to veterinary medicine, taking the time to understand each pet's unique needs. From routine check-ups to complex medical cases, we treat every patient with compassion and professionalism.

As active members of the Asheville community, we're proud to support local animal shelters and participate in pet wellness events throughout Buncombe County.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Veterinarian

Experienced Team

Our veterinarians bring decades of combined experience treating Asheville's pets through all life stages.

Preventive Focus

We emphasize preventive care to help your pet avoid health issues common in our mountain climate.

Modern Facility

Our clinic features up-to-date diagnostic equipment while maintaining a warm, comfortable atmosphere.

Local Knowledge

We understand the specific health challenges pets face in Western North Carolina's unique environment.

Schedule Your Pet's Visit Today

Contact us to book an appointment or learn more about our comprehensive veterinary services.

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-vet-r90

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Dr. Wilson has been incredibly patient with our 14-year-old lab mix who has arthritis and kidney issues. She created a manageable treatment plan that's improved his quality of life significantly. The staff always remembers his name and makes him feel comfortable, even when he's nervous.

Sarah K. Senior Pet Care
“

When our cat ate part of a lily plant (toxic to cats!), Horizon got us in immediately. They stabilized him and explained everything clearly during a very scary time. Their follow-up calls showed genuine care. So grateful for their quick action - it saved our cat's life.

Michael T. Emergency Care
“

Our rescue dog had terrible dental disease when we adopted him. The team at Horizon did an amazing job with his cleaning and extractions. They even called the next day to check on him. His breath is better and he's clearly more comfortable now when eating.

Emily R. Dental Care
“

Our German Shepherd was reactive on walks, making the Blue Ridge Parkway trails stressful. After working with Horizon's behavior specialist, we've seen huge improvements. Their training techniques were practical for our lifestyle and made walks enjoyable again.

David L. Behavioral Consultation
“

Living near the French Broad River means lots of ticks. Horizon's preventive recommendations have kept our dogs protected without any side effects. They test annually and explain the local parasite risks clearly. Worth every penny for peace of mind.

Jessica M. Parasite Prevention
“

Our overweight cat wasn't responding to diet changes we tried on our own. The nutritional plan from Horizon helped him lose 3 pounds safely over 6 months. They considered his arthritis and picky eating habits in their recommendations. He's more active now at age 9 than he was at 6!

Robert C. Nutritional Counseling

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should my pet have a wellness exam?
We recommend annual exams for most adult pets, every 6 months for seniors, and more frequent visits for puppies/kittens during their first year.
What vaccinations does my pet need in Asheville?
Core vaccines plus additional protection based on your pet's lifestyle. We'll recommend a schedule based on local disease risks and your pet's exposure.
Do you offer same-day sick visits?
Yes, we reserve appointments each day for urgent concerns. Call early for best availability.
